name: bakery-tech-pro
description: Professional bakery equipment website with multi-language support and modular architecture

scripts.build: npm run download:images && npm run optimize:images && npm run split:lang && webpack --mode=production && node scripts/build/copy-translations.js && npm run build:i18n
scripts.build:fast: npm run download:images && npm run optimize:images && npm run split:lang && webpack --mode=production && node scripts/build/copy-translations.js && npm run build:i18n
scripts.build:static: npm run download:images && npm run optimize:images && npm run split:lang && webpack --mode=production && node scripts/build/copy-translations.js && npm run build:i18n && node scripts/build/verify-static-build.js
scripts.build:pack: npm run optimize:images && npm run split:lang && webpack --mode=production && node scripts/build/copy-translations.js && npm run build:i18n && node scripts/build/verify-static-build.js
scripts.build:withFeishu: node scripts/product/ensure-product-data-table.js && npm run i18n:extract && npm run product:sync:source && npm run merge:i18n && npm run translate:products:incremental && npm run product:sync && npm run product:collect && npm run download:images && npm run optimize:images && npm run split:lang && webpack --mode=production && node scripts/build/copy-translations.js && npm run build:i18n
scripts.build:static:withFeishu: node scripts/product/ensure-product-data-table.js && npm run i18n:extract && npm run product:sync:source && npm run merge:i18n && npm run translate:products:incremental && npm run product:sync && npm run product:collect && npm run download:images && npm run optimize:images && npm run split:lang && webpack --mode=production && node scripts/build/copy-translations.js && npm run build:i18n && node scripts/build/verify-static-build.js
scripts.build:production: node scripts/product/ensure-product-data-table.js && npm run i18n:extract && npm run product:sync:source && npm run merge:i18n && npm run translate:products:incremental && npm run product:sync && npm run product:collect && npm run download:images && npm run optimize:images && npm run split:lang && webpack --mode=production && node scripts/build/copy-translations.js && npm run build:i18n && node scripts/build/verify-static-build.js
scripts.build:production:full: node scripts/product/ensure-product-data-table.js && npm run i18n:extract && npm run product:sync:source && npm run merge:i18n && npm run translate:products && npm run product:sync && npm run product:collect && npm run download:images && npm run optimize:images && npm run split:lang && webpack --mode=production && node scripts/build/copy-translations.js && npm run build:i18n && node scripts/build/verify-static-build.js
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint && npm run lint:css
scripts.lint:all:fix: npm run lint:fix && npm run lint:css:fix

author: YuKoLi Technology
